description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a predominantly brick exterior, surrounded by a rectangular yard enclosed by a green hedge. The front facade features large, rectangular windows and a main entryway with a small porch area. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a patio with outdoor furniture, and a separate paved area with a round table and chairs. Mature trees and landscaped shrubs are distributed throughout the property, adding greenery and shade. A driveway leads to a covered parking area on one side of the house, while the rear and side yards are designed for leisure and outdoor activities. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story brick house with large windows, a flat roof, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool, patio, and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a small porch with outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and outdoor dining area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, deck, and extensive glass windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, covered parking, and side yard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, single door, and small porch area with minimal steps
